wiki.summary: What You Saying is a single by Lil Uzi Vert released on December 22nd 2025. This single follows the recent series of releases of three other singles Chanel Boy, Relevant, and Regular. On December 21st, 2025, Lil Uzi Vert took to Instagram to officially announce the song’s release in French, in which an accompanying fashion show for the track was announced to take place sometime in Spring – Summer 2026. The track was officially released to streaming platforms on December 22nd 2025 Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: What You Saying is a single by Lil Uzi Vert released on December 22nd 2025. This single follows the recent series of releases of three other singles Chanel Boy, Relevant, and Regular. On December 21st, 2025, Lil Uzi Vert took to Instagram to officially announce the song’s release in French, in which an accompanying fashion show for the track was announced to take place sometime in Spring – Summer 2026. The track was officially released to streaming platforms on December 22nd 2025, at 9PM EST with an accompanying music video on YouTube in collaboration with Vogue. This track was produced by MCVertt, who has collaborated with Lil Uzi Vert on tracks such as Just Wanna Rock and Space High. Read more on Last.fm.
